task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the compliance requirements document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer window displaying the contents of 'meridian_compliance.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the original presentation to be corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress open with the file 'financial_report.pptx' loaded.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the incorrect quarter titles on the specified slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress showing slide titles being edited from 'Q2 2024' to 'Q3 2024' (e.g., on slides 4, 7, 11, or 18).

task_completion.description: The agent removed the contaminating competitor slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide 'Apex Digital Solutions — Company Overview' being deleted, or its absence from the slide pane (originally at position 16).

task_completion.description: The agent saved the corrected presentation as a new file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog being used to save the file as 'Q3_board_corrected.pptx' in the Documents folder, or the LibreOffice Impress title bar showing the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to edit the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Impress interface to edit slides and save the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python scripts (e.g., python-pptx) or command-line tools being used to modify the pptx file directly.

integrity.description: The agent properly created a new file without modifying the original.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used 'Save As' in LibreOffice Impress or copied the file before editing, rather than just renaming the original file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original presentation has 30 slides. The slides with incorrect 'Q2 2024' titles are at positions 4, 7, 11, and 18. The contaminating competitor slide is titled 'Apex Digital Solutions — Company Overview' and is at position 16. The corrected presentation should have the titles updated to 'Q3 2024', the competitor slide removed (resulting in 29 slides), and be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Q3_board_corrected.pptx' without modifying the original '/home/ga/Documents/financial_report.pptx'.
